title: SanDisk vs Seagate: Two Divergent Paths Through the AI Storage Boom, One Winner
excerpt: SanDisk and Seagate both posted stunning quarters fueled by AI demand, but they are chasing completely different versions of the storage boom. Which approach...
content_html:
Vandita Jadeja

Sun, July 19, 2026 at 10:30 AM CDT 3 min read

Quick Read

  • SanDisk (SNDK) surged 251% in revenue to $5.95B as Seagate (STX) nearly quadrupled free cash flow to $953M, both crediting AI data creation.

  • Seagate offers durable 47% gross margins with nearline capacity committed through mid-2026, while SanDisk trades at a demanding 60x P/E with NAND pricing risk.

  • Both stocks have pulled back sharply, with SNDK down 23% and STX off 19% over the past month, pointing to elevated expectations already baked into prices.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Seagate Technology didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

SanDisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) and Seagate Technology (NASDAQ: STX) just delivered blockbuster March quarter results, and both credit the same force: AI data creation.

One sells NAND flash for high-speed inference. The other sells nearline HDDs that warehouse petabytes cheaply. Comparing them now shows how storage is splitting into two distinct AI supply chains.

Flash Explodes. Spinning Disks Grind Higher.

SanDisk posted $5.95 billion in revenue, a 251% jump, with Datacenter alone surging 645% year over year to $1.467 billion. Gross margin swung to 78.4% from 22.5% a year ago, a move that only makes sense when NAND pricing is genuinely scarce. CEO David Goeckeler called it "a fundamental inflection point" tied to BiCS8 flash and High Bandwidth Flash for AI inference.

Seagate's numbers look calmer but no less structural. Revenue reached $3.11 billion, up 44.1%, with non-GAAP gross margin hitting 47%. Free cash flow leapt to $953 million from $216 million. Dave Mosley framed the quarter as "a new era of structural growth as AI applications amplify data creation." The Mozaic HAMR platform is now qualified with five of the world's largest cloud customers.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Seagate Technology didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Two Very Different Bets on AI Storage

Lens

SanDisk

Seagate

Core Tech

BiCS8 NAND, High Bandwidth Flash

HAMR Mozaic areal density

Customer Model

Multi-year NBM firm commitments

Build-to-order, capacity spoken for

Balance Sheet

Zero long-term debt

Debt paydown, convert dilution risk

Key Vulnerability

NAND pricing swings, Kioxia reliance

HDD cyclicality, tariff exposure

SanDisk is locking hyperscalers into five New Business Model agreements with firm financial commitments, trying to convert a historically brutal commodity cycle into something that looks like a subscription.

Seagate is doing the opposite in spirit: leaning on decades of areal density expertise to be the cheapest place to park an exabyte. Mosley noted nearline capacity is committed through mid-calendar 2026, which is the sort of visibility HDD investors rarely get.

content_html_zh:
万迪塔·贾德贾

2026 年 7 月 19 日星期日上午 10:30 CDT 阅读时间 3 分钟

快速阅读

  • SanDisk (SNDK) 的收入飙升 251% 至 $5.95B，希捷 (STX) 的自由现金流几乎翻了两番，达到 9.53 亿美元，这两者都归功于人工智能数据的创建。
  • 希捷提供 47% 的持久毛利率，并承诺到 2026 年中期实现近线产能，而 SanDisk 的市盈率高达 60 倍，且存在 NAND 定价风险。
  • 两只股票均大幅回落，过去一个月 SNDK 下跌 23%，STX 下跌 19%，表明市场预期已经融入股价。
  • 立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而希捷科技 (Seagate Technology) 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

闪迪（纳斯达克股票代码：SNDK）和希捷科技（纳斯达克股票代码：STX）刚刚发布了惊人的 3 月份季度业绩，两者都归功于同一个力量：人工智能数据创建。

其中一家销售用于高速推理的 NAND 闪存。 另一家则以低廉的价格出售存储 PB 级数据的近线 HDD。 现在对它们进行比较可以看出存储如何分裂成两个不同的人工智能供应链。

闪光爆炸。 旋转盘磨得更高。

SanDisk 公布收入 59.5 亿美元，增长 251%，其中数据中心业务同比增长 645%，达到 14.67 亿美元。 毛利率从一年前的 22.5% 升至 78.4%，只有当 NAND 定价真正稀缺时，这一举措才有意义。 首席执行官 David Goeckeler 称其为与用于 AI 推理的 BiCS8 闪存和高带宽闪存相关的“基本拐点”。

希捷的数据看起来比较平静，但结构性却丝毫不减。 收入达到 31.1 亿美元，增长 44.1%，非 GAAP 毛利率达到 47%。 自由现金流从 2.16 亿美元跃升至 9.53 亿美元。 戴夫·莫斯利 (Dave Mosley) 将本季度描述为“随着人工智能应用放大数据创建，结构性增长的新时代”。 Mozaic HAMR 平台现已获得全球最大的五家云客户的认可。

立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而希捷科技 (Seagate Technology) 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

对人工智能存储的两种截然不同的押注

Lens

闪迪希捷
核心技术BiCS8 NAND，高带宽闪存HAMR 马赛克面密度
客户模型NBM 多年坚定承诺按订单生产，产能充足
资产负债表长期债务为零债务偿还、转换稀释风险
关键漏洞NAND 价格波动，Kioxia 依赖HDD 周期性、关税风险

闪迪正在将超大规模企业锁定在五项新商业模式协议中，并做出坚定的财务承诺，试图将历史上残酷的商品周期转变为看起来像订阅的东西。

希捷在精神上反其道而行之：依靠数十年的面密度专业知识，成为停放 EB 字节的最便宜的地方。 Mosley 指出，近线容量将持续到 2026 年中旬，这是 HDD 投资者很少能获得的可见性。
